name: Functional Brands Inc.
business: Functional Brands Inc. manufactures and distributes nutraceutical supplements under brands including Kirkman, P2i, and Tru2u.health, serving customers such as individuals with special dietary needs, expectant mothers, and general wellness consumers. Products are sold over the counter and are not FDA approved.

exposures.sentence: Our principal business is the production, marketing, sales, and distribution of nutraceutical products through our Kirkman division.

In February 2026, we launched Tru2u.health, a new digitally native health platform that expands the Company's strategic footprint from traditional dietary supplement manufacturing into integrated supported wellness services.

catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we launched Tru2u.health, a new digitally native health platform that expands the Company's strategic footprint from traditional dietary supplement manufacturing into integrated supported wellness services.

catalysts.event: Exchange of Series A and B Convertible Preferred Stock for Series C Preferred Stock, cash, notes, and common stock
catalysts.sentence: On March 9, 2026, the Company entered into an Exchange and Amendment Agreement with certain investors, pursuant to which such investors exchanged all of their outstanding shares of the Company's Series A and Series B Convertible Preferred Stock for a combination of newly issued Series C Convertible Preferred Stock, cash, senior secured convertible promissory notes and shares of the Company's common stock.

catalysts.event: Nasdaq deficiency letter compliance period deadline
catalysts.sentence: In accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A) the Company has a compliance period of 180 calendar days, or until June 29, 2026, in which to regain compliance with the minimum bid price requirement.

tamClaims.claim: Global Nutritional Supplements Market valued at approximately $517.09B in 2025, CAGR 6.6% from 2026 to 2033
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grand View Research, the Global Nutritional Supplements Market is valued at approximately $517.09B in 2025 and is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.6% from 2026 to 2033.
